title: Enforce Least-Agency with output validation and tool guardrails
source: OWASP Top 10 Agentic Applications 2026 (ASI02, ASI05, ASI10)
description: No validation that agents stay within scope. parse_agent_output() accepts file paths without sandbox validation. --dangerously-skip-permissions has no audit trail.
proposed_changes: Add validate_agent_output_paths() filtering paths outside project root. Add sanitize_agent_output(). Add audit_log_security_event() for security events. Validate plan JSON schema.
